features.description: Complete the pending review triage workflow with the repo-local desloppify binary. Use `.venv/bin/desloppify plan triage --run-stages --runner codex` or the minimum staged subset still required by `desloppify next` so the live queue becomes executor-ready.
expectedBehavior: The pending planning stages in `.venv/bin/desloppify next` are completed
The queue reflects current review findings rather than stale planning debt
No code changes are required unless the queue explicitly calls for them

features.description: Inspect the refreshed queue and backlog with `.venv/bin/desloppify plan queue`, `.venv/bin/desloppify next`, and `.venv/bin/desloppify backlog`. Reorder or focus the plan only if it materially improves execution order, then capture the selected top fixes for the next milestone.
expectedBehavior: The top execution slice is explicit and justified
High-confidence fixes are identified from the refreshed queue
Queue changes are documented in the mission handoff

features.description: Validate that milestone-1 completed the planning refresh correctly and that the mission is now executing against the repo-local desloppify queue.
expectedBehavior: The queue is executor-ready
The repo-local `.venv/bin/desloppify` state is authoritative
No accidental regressions were introduced during planning work

features.description: If it remains in the refreshed queue, fix the `promptYesNo` blank-default behavior in `internal/cli/cli.go` so blank input follows `defaultYes` instead of always resolving to yes. Add or tighten CLI tests around both default branches.
expectedBehavior: Blank yes/no input respects `defaultYes`
CLI tests lock the behavior down for both true and false defaults
No unrelated CLI contract regressions are introduced

features.description: If it remains in the refreshed queue, add meaningful tests for `internal/client/streamutils.go` and any adjacent helpers the refreshed test-health queue prioritizes. Use the repo-local queue as the source of truth for scope.
expectedBehavior: Targeted test-health findings are resolved with real tests
Coverage for the selected module increases measurably
All tests, lint, and build pass

features.description: Validate the high-leverage follow-on fixes selected from the refreshed queue, with attention to CLI contract behavior and test-health regressions.
expectedBehavior: Relevant tests pass
Lint passes
Build succeeds
The touched queue items are honestly resolved

features.description: Refresh the highest-value subjective review dimensions with the repo-local desloppify workflow. Start from the current recommended set (`ai_generated_debt`, `test_strategy`, `authorization_consistency`) and include stale dimensions if the refreshed queue still flags them.
expectedBehavior: Priority subjective dimensions are re-reviewed with the current codebase
Review imports refresh stale or missing subjective coverage
The refreshed review output is captured in desloppify state

features.description: Run the final repo-local quality scan after the refreshed queue work is complete. Record whether the strict score improved beyond 83.3 and summarize any remaining plateau causes honestly.
expectedBehavior: A final `.venv/bin/desloppify scan --path .` is recorded
Strict/objective/verified scores are summarized
Remaining blockers are documented without gaming the score
